scripts.typecheck: py -3.10 -m venv .venv && .venv\Scripts\python -m pip install -r requirements.txt && .venv\Scripts\python -m pip install pytest && .venv\Scripts\python -m pytest -q && .venv\Scripts\python -m compileall backtest.py dataset.py features.py infer.py main.py models.py models_dl.py storage.py train.py tests
scripts.test: py -3.10 -m venv .venv && .venv\Scripts\python -m pip install -r requirements.txt && .venv\Scripts\python -m pip install pytest && .venv\Scripts\python -m pytest -q && .venv\Scripts\python -m compileall backtest.py dataset.py features.py infer.py main.py models.py models_dl.py storage.py train.py tests
